title: Dashboard: Capture list view
description:
Implement the main capture list view for the dashboard.

## Features
- Recent captures with status indicators
- Filter by: all, pending review, failed, needs auth
- Search/filter by route, date, content

## Test Example
```
Test: View capture list
- Navigate to dashboard
- See recent captures with status indicators
- Use filter dropdown to show only 'needs auth' captures
- Use search to find captures by content
```

title: Dashboard: Route management
description:
Manage routes from the dashboard.

## Features
- List all routes with stats (total items, success rate, last used)
- View/edit route triggers manually
- View few-shot examples for each route
- Add/remove examples from the test set

## Test Example
```
Test: Edit route trigger
- Navigate to route management
- Select a route
- View current triggers and stats
- Edit trigger pattern
- Save changes
- Verify changes take effect
```

title: Dashboard: Verify capture flow
description:
Allow users to verify that captures were routed correctly.

## Features
- 'Verify correct' button on capture detail view
- Sets verificationState to 'human_verified'
- Verified captures appear in test suite

## Test Example
```
Test: Verify a capture
- View capture that executed successfully
- Click 'Verify correct'
- Capture.verificationState changes to 'human_verified'
- Capture appears in test suite
```

title: Timezone handling for dates
description:
Use user's timezone for today's date, and implement smart date handling.

## Requirements
- Use user's configured timezone for 'today'
- Smart dates: 1am Friday night should still be considered 'Friday' not 'Saturday morning'
- Handle edge cases around midnight

## Context
From SPEC_LATER.md other ideas section.

title: Dashboard: Capture detail view
description:
Implement capture detail view with execution trace.

## Features
- Full execution trace (expandable)
- What code ran at each step (version hashes)
- Visual indication of capture status and routing decision

## Test Example
```
Test: View capture details
- Click on capture in list view
- See full execution trace
- Expand trace steps to see details
- See version hashes for code that ran
```

title: Dashboard: Correction flow
description:
Allow users to correct misrouted captures.

## Features
- 'This was wrong' button opens correction flow
- 'Where should this have gone?' → select existing route or describe new one
- System learns from correction (updates triggers, adds to negative examples)
- Option to 'retire' old captures that are no longer representative

## Test Example
```
Test: Correct a misrouted capture
- View capture that went to wrong route
- Click 'This was wrong'
- Select correct route
- System updates route triggers to avoid this error
- Original capture marked as negative example for wrong route
```

title: Phase 3: Dashboard + Feedback
description:
Give the user visibility into the system and ability to provide feedback that improves routing.

## Success Criteria
- Dashboard shows all captures with filtering
- User can verify captures (sets human_verified)
- User can correct misrouted captures
- Route editing works
- Test suite view shows verified captures
- Changes validated against test suite

## Implementation Notes
- Simple server-rendered HTML is fine (or minimal React)
- No need for real-time updates—refresh to see changes
- Mobile-friendly but desktop-first
- Auth: same token as API, or simple session

title: Per-route/destination context from user input
description:
Allow users to add context to routes and destinations via natural language input.

## Requirements
- User ability to add per-route or per-destination context
- Should be editable in a UI somewhere
- ALSO: Should be able to add updates via top-level input!
  - e.g. 'intend intentions are only for today, so if something doesn't say today then don't put it there!'
  - e.g. 'if I say message Jess, use whatsapp'
- System should learn from these context updates

## Context
From SPEC_LATER.md other ideas section.

title: Dashboard: Test suite view
description:
View and manage the test suite of verified captures.

## Features
- All human-verified captures as 'golden' tests
- Run new route changes against test suite before deploying
- Show which captures would be re-routed by a proposed change
- Allow retiring outdated test cases

## Test Example
```
Test: Test suite validation
- Create new trigger for existing route
- System runs against test suite
- Shows 'This change would re-route 3 verified captures'
- User can proceed (and retire those) or cancel
```

title: Dashboard: Auth status
description:
Show integration auth status and allow management.

## Features
- Which integrations are connected
- Which have pending captures blocked
- Re-auth / disconnect buttons

## Test Example
```
Test: View auth status
- Navigate to auth status page
- See connected integrations with status
- See count of blocked captures per integration
- Click disconnect on an integration
- Verify tokens are cleared
```
